title: Korak 10

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import random
import string


# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

print(all_characters)
print(random.random())
challengeFiles.seed:
import random
import string


# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

print(all_characters)
print(random.random())

tests.text: Treba da promeniš svoj trenutni poziv print() ili da odštampaš random.choice(all_characters).

description:
Funkcija choice() iz modula random koja uzima sekvencu i vraća bilo koji element te sekvence nasumično.

Promeni svoj poziv print() koristeći funkciju choice() preko all_characters kao argument.
